official_functions.role: Construct the official Play clientbound level_event packet fixture
Write, decode, and observe the official level_event body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state
Write and dispatch-decode the full official Play clientbound level_event frame

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns level_event to packet id 0x2e.
The official Play clientbound protocol codec dispatches the level_event id to ClientboundLevelEventPacket.
The official level_event body is one int type, one BlockPos, one int data, and one boolean globalEvent.
The fixture uses primitive constructor fields and does not require initialized Level, sound, particle, block-event runtime state, or game state.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded fields, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer level event semantics, sound/particle behavior, initialized Level state, render readiness, or client-load completion.
